Targeted demethylation of the BRD7 promoter based on CRISPR/dCas9 system inhibits the malignant progression of nasopharyngeal carcinoma

evidence_entities.text: BRD7 has been confirmed to be lowly expressed in nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) tissues and exerts tumour suppressive roles
There was hypermethylation modification in BRD7 promoter, which was negatively correlated with BRD7 expression
we constructed a LentiCRISPRv2/dCas9‐TET1CD‐sgRNAs system targeting specific methylation sites of BRD7 promoter
targeting demethylation of BRD7 inhibits the malignant progression of NPC

notes: This paper describes a novel CRISPR/dCas9-based approach for targeted demethylation of the BRD7 promoter in nasopharyngeal carcinoma
The study demonstrates both in vitro and in vivo efficacy of the demethylation system
BRD7 functions as a tumor suppressor gene that is downregulated by promoter hypermethylation in NPC
